name: Chocolate Rice Krispie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the melted margarine, milk chocolate chips, vanilla, and corn syrup until smooth.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar, stirring continuously until the mixture is well combined.
3. Gently fold in the Rice Krispies cereal until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
4. Transfer the mixture to a 9 x 11 inch greased baking pan and press it firmly into an even layer.
5. Allow the bars to cool completely at room temperature, then cut into squares.
